---
title: ""
---

::::: {.grid .homepage-hero}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
![](images/headshot.jpg){.profile-image}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-8}
# Brady Rippon

Hello! I'm a biostatistician and research software developer with interests in clinical research tools, statistical programming, and reproducible research designs.

```{=html}
<!-- 
[Projects](packages.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Packages](packages.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
-->
```
:::
:::::

## Background

::: {.timeline}

::: {.timeline-item}
::: {.timeline-dot}
:::

::: {.timeline-content}
### Work

**Research Biostatistician**  
Weill Cornell Medicine

**Adjust Instructor**  
Columbia University, Mailman School of Public Health
:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
::: {.timeline-dot}
:::

::: {.timeline-content}
### Education

**M.S., Biostatistics**  
Columbia University, Mailman School of Public Health

**B.S., Physics**  
University of Scranton
:::
:::

:::

## Current Work

- Reproducible reporting tools in R
- Clinical research workflows
- Statistical dashboards and automation
- R package development
